en: I purred happily and I just realized I'm not holding my microphone.
ko: 나는 행복하게 갸르릉거렸고, 마이크를 들고 있지 않다는 걸 방금 깨달았어.

en: I was dying earlier today, and then I died. Now I'm dead.
ko: 오늘 아침에 죽어가다가, 결국 죽었어. 지금은 죽었어.

en: I had to cancel a date with Shauna Moe, I dweep, and I really like her.
ko: 샤우나 모와의 데이트를 취소해야 했어, 나는 바보 같고, 그녀를 정말 좋아해.

en: Do you think she'll still like me now that I'm dead? What is this?
ko: 내가 죽었는데도 그녀가 나를 여전히 좋아할까? 이게 뭐야?

en: It's food poisoning. I have it too.
I did not sleep for one second last night, and I cracked the bottom of the toilet bowl. Oh God, don't say that.
ko: 어젯밤에 1초도 못 잤고, 변기 바닥을 깨먹었어. 오, 제발 그런 말 하지 마.

en: Has anybody talked to Tom? I can't even imagine what that tiny little man must be feeling like.
ko: 톰과 이야기한 사람 있어? 그 작은 남자가 어떤 기분일지 상상도 못 해.

en: I have voided more than Tom's body weight in the last 12 hours alone.
ko: 지난 12시간 동안 톰의 체중보다 더 많은 걸 배출했어.

en: He might have just disappeared off the earth.
We need to call him. We must reach out to him.
ko: 그에게 전화해야 해. 꼭 연락해야 해.
